description: SOC team test queries for SIEM RAG Pipeline — all three indices (alerts / elastalert / vulnerabilities). Use POST http://localhost:8000/query with Content-Type: application/json. The 'source' field selects the index: alerts | elastalert | vulnerabilities | auto (default).

soc_levels.L1: Tier-1 analyst — alert triage, quick counts, initial classification
soc_levels.L2: Tier-2 analyst — investigation, correlation, rule tuning, severity-driven hunting
soc_levels.L3: Tier-3 analyst / threat hunter — semantic hunting, cross-index analysis, vulnerability research

aggregation.description: Counts, rankings, and breakdowns. Triggered by: top, count, average, sum. Routes to index-specific aggregation based on source field.

body.query: top source IPs in last 24 hours
top 10 elastalert rules triggered
count vulnerabilities by severity
count alerts per agent with severity breakdown

queries.title: Most affected packages with critical CVEs

body.query: top packages with critical vulnerabilities count

hybrid.description: kNN + BM25 hybrid search across the target index. Best for threat hunting and specific keyword queries.

body.query: brute force ssh login attempts

queries.title: Brute force rule triggered in ElastAlert

body.query: brute force rule fired alert triggered
privilege escalation sudo root access

queries.title: Unpatched critical CVE on Linux hosts

body.query: critical unpatched vulnerability Linux package
lateral movement between hosts suspicious login

severity_filter.description: Hybrid queries with per-index severity filtering. Alerts → rule.level (int 1-15). ElastAlert → alert_severity (low/medium/high/critical). Vulnerabilities → vuln_severity string + CVSS.

body.query: show alerts with severity between 10 to 15
high severity elastalert rule triggered
critical severity vulnerability CVE exploit
alerts severity between 6 to 8 agents and source IPs

queries.title: High severity CVEs on Windows hosts

body.query: high severity vulnerability Windows package outdated

semantic.description: Pure vector similarity search. Triggered by: similar, like. Finds documents semantically close to the described pattern regardless of exact keywords.

queries.title: Alerts similar to port scan / recon

body.query: alerts similar to port scan or network reconnaissance

queries.title: ElastAlert rules similar to C2 beacon detection

body.query: rules like command and control C2 beacon detection
vulnerabilities similar to remote code execution Log4Shell

queries.title: Alerts similar to ransomware file encryption

body.query: events similar to ransomware file encryption mass write
events similar to data exfiltration outbound large transfer

follow_up.description: Returns the cached result of the previous query in the same session. Use the same session_id as a prior query. Triggered by: 'previous result', 'those alerts', 'from above results'.

queries.title: Re-show previous alert results
queries.note: Use the session_id from a prior hybrid query (e.g. soc-hybrid-1)

body.query: show previous result

queries.title: Re-show previous ElastAlert aggregation
queries.note: Use the session_id from a prior elastalert aggregation (e.g. soc-agg-2)

body.query: those alerts from previous query

queries.title: Re-show previous vulnerability results
queries.note: Use the session_id from a prior vulnerability query (e.g. soc-sev-3)

body.query: from above results show me more detail

queries.title: Repeat last severity-filtered hunt
queries.note: Use the session_id from the severity filter query (e.g. soc-sev-4)

body.query: show me previous result for this session

queries.title: Repeat last cross-index semantic hunt
queries.note: Use the session_id from the cross-index semantic query (e.g. soc-sem-5)

body.query: from above results show me more detail

time_filtered.description: Any query type with explicit time range (ISO 8601 start_time / end_time). Overrides the default 24h window. Works across all source indices.

queries.title: Wazuh brute force in a 2-hour window

body.query: brute force ssh login attempts

queries.title: ElastAlert rules fired in evening window

body.query: top elastalert rules triggered
critical vulnerability CVE detected

queries.title: Malware detections over a full day

body.query: malware detected suspicious process file
suspicious login lateral movement failed authentication
